title: Multicolor Birthday Princess Prism Banner (3.6 Meters Long) 1 Piece - Vibrant & Eye-catching Party Decoration
features: BIRTHDAY PRINCESS BANNER: Add a magical touch to your little princess's birthday party with this vibrant, eye-catching banner that truly captures her special day.
3.6 METERS LONG: Stretching an impressive 3.6 meters, this banner is perfect for adorning walls, doorways, or tables, ensuring maximum visibility and adding a lively touch to your party setup.

EYE-CATCHING DESIGN: Featuring a dazzling multicolor prism effect, our birthday princess banner stands out from the crowd, making it the ideal decoration for creating memorable party photographs and a fun-filled atmosphere.
EASY SET UP: Secure this convenient, all-in-one banner in just a few minutes, and spend more time enjoying the party with family and friends.

PERFECT FOR PRINCESS-THEMED PARTIES: Whether it's a birthday celebration or a room decoration, this stylish and durable banner is versatile enough to suit any princess-inspired event, making it a must-have item for your party supply collection.
description: Product Description Celebrate your princess' birthday with our Prismatic Foil "Birthday Princess" Banner. 1 Birthday Banner - 12 ft. This prismatic banner features a pink "Birthday Princess" headline with colorful pastel flower designs. This disposable prismatic banner is perfect for celebrating fun birthday parties. Made of durable foil material, this prismatic banner is very eye catching with high quality prints. This product is easy to assemble, install, and can be stored and re-used. Box Contains 1 x Banner
